items.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch co-ordinated attacks across Mali
items.summary: Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north, in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years.

items.title: Mexico says US agents killed in crash weren't permitted to operate there
items.summary: The two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab.

items.title: Palestinians in West Bank and some in Gaza vote in local elections
items.summary: Local elections have been held in the occupied West Bank and in one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not taking part.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 川普取消美伊會談後　稱收到新提案、內容更好
items.summary: 美國總統川普今天宣布，已取消特使團原定赴巴基斯坦與伊朗展開會談的行程。他隨後表示，伊朗想談的時候，只要打電話就可以，並稱，當一取消行程，還不到10分鐘，美國就收到一份新文件，內容比原先提案好...…

items.title: 從戰地貓到救援蜜蜂　烏克蘭人戰火中不忘守護動物
items.summary: 烏克蘭軍人大多都很清楚，所有從軍的人，遲早都會變成愛貓的人。  美國有線電視新聞網（CNN）報導，無論是壕溝、檢查哨、被毀的家園還是醫療急救點，烏軍總能在前線最意想不到的地方發現貓的身影。貓...…

items.title: 取消赴巴和談行程　川普：不代表立即重啟美伊戰爭
items.summary: 美國總統川普（Donald Trump）今天宣布，他已取消特使團原定赴巴基斯坦與伊朗展開和平談判的行程，但他表示，這並不代表美國及以色列會立即恢復對伊朗戰事。  法新社報導，白宮稍早曾表示，...…
